reasoning_model_1: The model generates the audio with high content accuracy, matching the script '这部电影的配乐很美，让人感到平静。' perfectly. model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect content accuracy. The decisive factor is the adherence to the '舒缓的节奏' (soothing rhythm) instruction.
